title: cerastium mutabile var. jenisejense
intro: Cerastium mutabile var. jenisejense, also known as the variable chickweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cerastium mutabile var. jenisejense include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
